Promotion_date: The date when the promotion was made.
Promoter: The person who promoted the bakery's record.
Promotion_platform: The platform via which the promotion was broadcast.
Promotion_content: The content related to the promotion, such as staff shoutouts, marketing highlights.
Sales_record_month: The month of the sales record.
Sales_record_year: The year of the sales record.
Product_sold: The product sold that broke the record.
Quantity_sold: The quantity of the product sold.
Store_name: The name of the store where the promotion and sales record occurred.
